ast.name: error
ast.source: Detected multiple renderers concurrently rendering the same context provider. This is currently unsupported.
ast.target: 检测到多个渲染器同时渲染同一个 context provider。目前不支持此操作。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Expected to find the propagation root when scheduling context work. This error is likely caused by a bug in React. Please file an issue.
ast.target: 在调度上下文工作时，预期找到传播根。此错误可能由 React 的 bug 引起。请提交 issue。

ast.name: error
ast.source: An update (setState, replaceState, or forceUpdate) was scheduled from inside an update function. Update functions should be pure, with zero side-effects. Consider using componentDidUpdate or a callback.
ast.target: 更新（setState、replaceState 或 forceUpdate）是在更新函数内部被调度的。更新函数应当是纯函数，不应有副作用。请考虑使用 componentDidUpdate 或回调。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s(...): Expected the last optional `callback` argument to be a function. Instead received: %s.
ast.target: %s(...): 预期最后一个可选的 `callback` 参数为函数，但实际接收到：%s。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s.getDerivedStateFromProps(): A valid state object (or null) must be returned. You have returned undefined.
ast.target: %s.getDerivedStateFromProps(): 必须返回一个有效的 state 对象（或 null）。你返回了 undefined。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s.shouldComponentUpdate(): Returned undefined instead of a boolean value. Make sure to return true or false.
ast.target: %s.shouldComponentUpdate(): 返回了 undefined 而不是布尔值。请确保返回 true 或 false。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s(...): No `render` method found on the returned component instance: did you accidentally return an object from the constructor?
ast.target: %s(...): 在返回的组件实例上未找到 `render` 方法：你是否不小心从构造函数返回了一个对象？

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s(...): No `render` method found on the returned component instance: you may have forgotten to define `render`.
ast.target: %s(...): 在返回的组件实例上未找到 `render` 方法：你可能忘记定义 `render`。

ast.name: error
ast.source: getInitialState was defined on %s, a plain JavaScript class. This is only supported for classes created using React.createClass. Did you mean to define a state property instead?
ast.target: getInitialState 定义在 %s 上，它是一个普通的 JavaScript 类。这仅支持使用 React.createClass 创建的类。你是否想改为定义 state 属性？

ast.name: error
ast.source: getDefaultProps was defined on %s, a plain JavaScript class. This is only supported for classes created using React.createClass. Use a static property to define defaultProps instead.
ast.target: getDefaultProps 定义在 %s 上，它是一个普通的 JavaScript 类。这仅支持使用 React.createClass 创建的类。请改用静态属性来定义 defaultProps。

ast.name: error
ast.source: propTypes was defined as an instance property on %s. Use a static property to define propTypes instead.
ast.target: propTypes 在 %s 上被定义为实例属性。请改用静态属性来定义 propTypes。

ast.name: error
ast.source: contextType was defined as an instance property on %s. Use a static property to define contextType instead.
ast.target: contextType 被定义为 %s 的实例属性。请改用静态属性来定义 contextType。

ast.name: error
ast.source: contextTypes was defined as an instance property on %s. Use a static property to define contextTypes instead.
ast.target: contextTypes 被定义为 %s 的实例属性。请改用静态属性来定义 contextTypes。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s declares both contextTypes and contextType static properties. The legacy contextTypes property will be ignored.
ast.target: %s 同时声明了 contextTypes 和 contextType 静态属性。旧的 contextTypes 属性将被忽略。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s has a method called componentShouldUpdate(). Did you mean shouldComponentUpdate()? The name is phrased as a question because the function is expected to return a value.
ast.target: %s 有一个名为 componentShouldUpdate() 的方法。你是想写 shouldComponentUpdate() 吗？该名称采用疑问形式，因为该函数预期返回一个值。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s has a method called shouldComponentUpdate(). shouldComponentUpdate should not be used when extending React.PureComponent. Please extend React.Component if shouldComponentUpdate is used.
ast.target: %s 有一个名为 shouldComponentUpdate() 的方法。扩展 React.PureComponent 时不应使用 shouldComponentUpdate。如需使用 shouldComponentUpdate，请扩展 React.Component。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s has a method called componentDidUnmount(). But there is no such lifecycle method. Did you mean componentWillUnmount()?
ast.target: %s 有一个名为 componentDidUnmount() 的方法。但没有这样的生命周期方法。你是想写 componentWillUnmount() 吗？

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s has a method called componentDidReceiveProps(). But there is no such lifecycle method. If you meant to update the state in response to changing props, use componentWillReceiveProps(). If you meant to fetch data or run side-effects or mutations after React has updated the UI, use componentDidUpdate().
ast.target: %s 有一个名为 componentDidReceiveProps() 的方法。但没有这样的生命周期方法。如果你想在 props 变化时更新 state，请使用 componentWillReceiveProps()。如果你想在 React 更新 UI 后获取数据或执行副作用或变更，请使用 componentDidUpdate()。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s has a method called componentWillRecieveProps(). Did you mean componentWillReceiveProps()?
ast.target: %s 有一个名为 componentWillRecieveProps() 的方法。你是想写 componentWillReceiveProps() 吗？

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s has a method called UNSAFE_componentWillRecieveProps(). Did you mean UNSAFE_componentWillReceiveProps()?
ast.target: %s 有一个名为 UNSAFE_componentWillRecieveProps() 的方法。你是想写 UNSAFE_componentWillReceiveProps() 吗？

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s(...): When calling super() in `%s`, make sure to pass up the same props that your component's constructor was passed.
ast.target: %s(...): 在 `%s` 中调用 super() 时，确保传递与组件构造函数收到的相同 props。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Setting defaultProps as an instance property on %s is not supported and will be ignored. Instead, define defaultProps as a static property on %s.
ast.target: 不支持将 defaultProps 作为 %s 的实例属性，且将被忽略。请改为将 defaultProps 定义为 %s 的静态属性。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: getSnapshotBeforeUpdate() should be used with componentDidUpdate(). This component defines getSnapshotBeforeUpdate() only.
ast.target: %s：getSnapshotBeforeUpdate() 应与 componentDidUpdate() 一起使用。该组件只定义了 getSnapshotBeforeUpdate()。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: getDerivedStateFromProps() is defined as an instance method and will be ignored. Instead, declare it as a static method.
ast.target: %s：getDerivedStateFromProps() 被定义为实例方法，将被忽略。请改为声明为静态方法。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: getDerivedStateFromError() is defined as an instance method and will be ignored. Instead, declare it as a static method.
ast.target: %s：getDerivedStateFromError() 被定义为实例方法，将被忽略。请改为声明为静态方法。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: getSnapshotBeforeUpdate() is defined as a static method and will be ignored. Instead, declare it as an instance method.
ast.target: %s：getSnapshotBeforeUpdate() 被定义为静态方法，将被忽略。请改为声明为实例方法。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s.state: must be set to an object or null
ast.target: %s.state：必须设置为对象或 null

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s.getChildContext(): childContextTypes must be defined in order to use getChildContext().
ast.target: %s.getChildContext()：必须定义 childContextTypes 才能使用 getChildContext()。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s defines an invalid contextType. contextType should point to the Context object returned by React.createContext().%s
ast.target: %s 定义了无效的 contextType。contextType 应指向 React.createContext() 返回的 Context 对象。%s

ast.name: error
ast.source: `%s` uses `getDerivedStateFromProps` but its initial state is %s. This is not recommended. Instead, define the initial state by assigning an object to `this.state` in the constructor of `%s`. This ensures that `getDerivedStateFromProps` arguments have a consistent shape.
ast.target: `%s` 使用了 `getDerivedStateFromProps`，但其初始 state 为 %s。不推荐这样做。请改为在 `%s` 的构造函数中将对象赋值给 `this.state` 来定义初始 state。这样可确保 `getDerivedStateFromProps` 的参数具有一致的结构。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s.componentWillMount(): Assigning directly to this.state is deprecated (except inside a component's constructor). Use setState instead.
ast.target: %s.componentWillMount()：直接赋值给 this.state 已弃用（组件构造函数内部除外）。请改用 setState。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s.componentWillReceiveProps(): Assigning directly to this.state is deprecated (except inside a component's constructor). Use setState instead.
ast.target: %s.componentWillReceiveProps(): 直接给 this.state 赋值已弃用（组件构造函数内除外）。请改用 setState。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: It is not recommended to assign props directly to state because updates to props won't be reflected in state. In most cases, it is better to use props directly.
ast.target: %s: 不建议将 props 直接赋给 state，因为 props 的更新不会反映到 state 中。在大多数情况下，直接使用 props 更好。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Each child in a list should have a unique "key" prop. See https://reactjs.org/link/warning-keys for more information.
ast.target: 列表中的每个子项都应具有唯一的 "key" prop。更多信息请参见 https://reactjs.org/link/warning-keys。

ast.name: error
ast.source: A string ref, "%s", has been found within a strict mode tree. String refs are a source of potential bugs and should be avoided. We recommend using useRef() or createRef() instead. Learn more about using refs safely here: https://reactjs.org/link/strict-mode-string-ref
ast.target: 在严格模式树中发现了字符串 ref "%s"。字符串 ref 可能导致潜在 bug，应避免使用。我们建议改用 useRef() 或 createRef()。了解更多安全使用 refs 的信息： https://reactjs.org/link/strict-mode-string-ref

ast.name: error
ast.source: Functions are not valid as a React child. This may happen if you return a Component instead of <Component /> from render. Or maybe you meant to call this function rather than return it.
ast.target: 函数不能作为有效的 React 子项。这可能是因为你在 render 中返回了 Component 而不是 <Component />。或者你可能是想调用该函数而不是返回它。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Encountered two children with the same key, `%s`. Keys should be unique so that components maintain their identity across updates. Non-unique keys may cause children to be duplicated and/or omitted — the behavior is unsupported and could change in a future version.
ast.target: 遇到两个子项具有相同的 key，`%s`。key 应当唯一，以便组件在更新之间保持其身份。不唯一的 key 可能导致子项被重复和/或遗漏——这种行为不受支持，且未来版本可能会改变。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Using Generators as children is unsupported and will likely yield unexpected results because enumerating a generator mutates it. You may convert it to an array with `Array.from()` or the `[...spread]` operator before rendering. Keep in mind you might need to polyfill these features for older browsers.
ast.target: 将 Generator 作为子项不受支持，并且很可能产生意外结果，因为枚举 generator 会改变它。你可以在渲染前使用 `Array.from()` 或 `[...spread]` 操作符将其转换为数组。请注意，旧版浏览器可能需要为这些特性提供 polyfill。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s received a final argument that is not an array (instead, received `%s`). When specified, the final argument must be an array.
ast.target: %s 收到了一个非数组的最终参数（实际收到 `%s`）。当指定时，最终参数必须是数组。

ast.name: error
ast.source:
React has detected a change in the order of Hooks called by %s. This will lead to bugs and errors if not fixed. For more information, read the Rules of Hooks: https://reactjs.org/link/rules-of-hooks

   Previous render            Next render
   ------------------------------------------------------
%s   ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
ast.target:
React 检测到由 %s 调用的 Hooks 顺序发生了变化。如果不修复，这将导致 bug 和错误。更多信息请阅读 Hooks 规则： https://reactjs.org/link/rules-of-hooks

   上一次渲染            下一次渲染
   ------------------------------------------------------
%s   ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s received a final argument during this render, but not during the previous render. Even though the final argument is optional, its type cannot change between renders.
ast.target: %s 在本次渲染中接收了最终参数，但在上一次渲染中没有。尽管最终参数是可选的，但其类型不能在渲染之间改变。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Internal React error: Expected static flag was missing. Please notify the React team.
ast.target: React 内部错误：缺少预期的静态标志。请通知 React 团队。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Internal error: Expected work-in-progress queue to be a clone. This is a bug in React.
ast.target: 内部错误：预期工作中的队列应为克隆。这是 React 的一个 bug。

ast.name: error
ast.source: The result of getServerSnapshot should be cached to avoid an infinite loop
ast.target: 应缓存 getServerSnapshot 的结果以避免无限循环

ast.name: error
ast.source: The result of getSnapshot should be cached to avoid an infinite loop
ast.target: 应缓存 getSnapshot 的结果以避免无限循环

ast.name: error
ast.source: Expected useImperativeHandle() first argument to either be a ref callback or React.createRef() object. Instead received: %s.
ast.target: 期望 useImperativeHandle() 的第一个参数是 ref 回调或 React.createRef() 对象。实际收到：%s。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Expected useImperativeHandle() second argument to be a function that creates a handle. Instead received: %s.
ast.target: 期望 useImperativeHandle() 的第二个参数是用于创建句柄的函数。实际收到：%s。

ast.name: error
ast.source: State updates from the useState() and useReducer() Hooks don't support the second callback argument. To execute a side effect after rendering, declare it in the component body with useEffect().
ast.target: 来自 useState() 和 useReducer() Hook 的状态更新不支持第二个回调参数。要在渲染后执行副作用，请在组件体内使用 useEffect() 声明。

ast.name: error
ast.source: It looks like %s is reassigning its own `this.props` while rendering. This is not supported and can lead to confusing bugs.
ast.target: 看起来 %s 在渲染时重新赋值了自己的 `this.props`。这不受支持，并可能导致难以理解的 bug。

ast.name: error
ast.source: The <%s /> component appears to have a render method, but doesn't extend React.Component. This is likely to cause errors. Change %s to extend React.Component instead.
ast.target: <%s /> 组件似乎有 render 方法，但未继承 React.Component。这很可能导致错误。请将 %s 改为继承 React.Component。

ast.name: error
ast.source: The <%s /> component appears to be a function component that returns a class instance. Change %s to a class that extends React.Component instead. If you can't use a class try assigning the prototype on the function as a workaround. `%s.prototype = React.Component.prototype`. Don't use an arrow function since it cannot be called with `new` by React.
ast.target: <%s /> 组件看起来是一个返回类实例的函数组件。请将 %s 改为继承 React.Component 的类。如果无法使用类，可作为变通方案在函数上赋值 prototype：`%s.prototype = React.Component.prototype`。不要使用箭头函数，因为 React 不能用 `new` 调用它。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s(...): childContextTypes cannot be defined on a function component.
ast.target: %s(...): 不能在函数组件上定义 childContextTypes。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: Function components do not support getDerivedStateFromProps.
ast.target: %s：函数组件不支持 getDerivedStateFromProps。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: Function components do not support contextType.
ast.target: %s：函数组件不支持 contextType。

ast.name: error
ast.source: "%s" is not a valid value for revealOrder on <SuspenseList />. Use lowercase "%s" instead.
ast.target: 在 <SuspenseList /> 上，"%s" 不是 revealOrder 的有效值。请改用小写 "%s"。

ast.name: error
ast.source: "%s" is not a valid value for revealOrder on <SuspenseList />. React uses the -s suffix in the spelling. Use "%ss" instead.
ast.target: 在 <SuspenseList /> 上，"%s" 不是 revealOrder 的有效值。React 在拼写中使用 -s 后缀。请改用 "%ss"。

ast.name: error
ast.source: "%s" is not a supported revealOrder on <SuspenseList />. Did you mean "together", "forwards" or "backwards"?
ast.target: 在 <SuspenseList /> 上，"%s" 不是受支持的 revealOrder。你是想用 "together"、"forwards" 或 "backwards" 吗？

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s is not a supported value for revealOrder on <SuspenseList />. Did you mean "together", "forwards" or "backwards"?
ast.target: 在 <SuspenseList /> 上，%s 不是受支持的 revealOrder 值。你是想用 "together"、"forwards" 或 "backwards" 吗？

ast.name: error
ast.source: "%s" is not a supported value for tail on <SuspenseList />. Did you mean "collapsed" or "hidden"?
ast.target: 在 <SuspenseList /> 上，"%s" 不是受支持的 tail 值。你是想用 "collapsed" 或 "hidden" 吗？

ast.name: error
ast.source: <SuspenseList tail="%s" /> is only valid if revealOrder is "forwards" or "backwards". Did you mean to specify revealOrder="forwards"?
ast.target: <SuspenseList tail="%s" /> 仅在 revealOrder 为 "forwards" 或 "backwards" 时有效。你是想指定 revealOrder="forwards" 吗？

ast.name: error
ast.source: A nested %s was passed to row #%s in <SuspenseList />. Wrap it in an additional SuspenseList to configure its revealOrder: <SuspenseList revealOrder=...> ... <SuspenseList revealOrder=...>{%s}</SuspenseList> ... </SuspenseList>
ast.target: 在 <SuspenseList /> 的第 #%s 行传入了一个嵌套的 %s。请将其包裹在额外的 SuspenseList 中以配置其 revealOrder：<SuspenseList revealOrder=...> ... <SuspenseList revealOrder=...>{%s}</SuspenseList> ... </SuspenseList>

ast.name: error
ast.source: A single row was passed to a <SuspenseList revealOrder="%s" />. This is not useful since it needs multiple rows. Did you mean to pass multiple children or an array?
ast.target: 向 <SuspenseList revealOrder="%s" /> 传递了单行。这没有意义，因为它需要多行。你是想传递多个子元素还是一个数组？

ast.name: error
ast.source: The `value` prop is required for the `<Context.Provider>`. Did you misspell it or forget to pass it?
ast.target: `<Context.Provider>` 需要 `value` 属性。你是拼写错误还是忘记传递了？

ast.name: error
ast.source: A context consumer was rendered with multiple children, or a child that isn't a function. A context consumer expects a single child that is a function. If you did pass a function, make sure there is no trailing or leading whitespace around it.
ast.target: 渲染了带有多个子元素的 context consumer，或其子元素不是函数。context consumer 期望只有一个子元素且为函数。如果你确实传递了函数，请确保它前后没有多余空白。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Unexpected return value from a callback ref in %s. A callback ref should not return a function.
ast.target: %s 中的回调 ref 返回了意外的值。回调 ref 不应返回函数。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s.getSnapshotBeforeUpdate(): A snapshot value (or null) must be returned. You have returned undefined.
ast.target: %s.getSnapshotBeforeUpdate()：必须返回一个快照值（或 null）。你返回了 undefined。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s must not return anything besides a function, which is used for clean-up.%s
ast.target: %s 除了用于清理的函数之外，不得返回任何内容。%s

ast.name: error
ast.source: Unexpected ref object provided for %s. Use either a ref-setter function or React.createRef().
ast.target: 为 %s 提供了意外的 ref 对象。请使用 ref 设置函数或 React.createRef()。

ast.name: error
ast.source: The current testing environment is not configured to support act(...)
ast.target: 当前测试环境未配置为支持 act(...)

ast.name: error
ast.source: useInsertionEffect must not schedule updates.
ast.target: useInsertionEffect 不得调度更新。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Expected scheduled callback to exist. This error is likely caused by a bug in React. Please file an issue.
ast.target: 预期的已调度回调不存在。该错误可能由 React 的 bug 导致。请提交问题。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Maximum update depth exceeded. This can happen when a component calls setState inside useEffect, but useEffect either doesn't have a dependency array, or one of the dependencies changes on every render.
ast.target: 超过最大更新深度。这可能发生在组件在 useEffect 内调用 setState 时，但 useEffect 要么没有依赖数组，要么其中某个依赖在每次渲染时都会变化。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Can't perform a React state update on a component that hasn't mounted yet. This indicates that you have a side-effect in your render function that asynchronously later calls tries to update the component. Move this work to useEffect instead.
ast.target: 无法对尚未挂载的组件执行 React 状态更新。这表示你的 render 函数中存在副作用，它会在之后异步调用尝试更新组件。请将这项工作移到 useEffect 中。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cannot update a component (`%s`) while rendering a different component (`%s`). To locate the bad setState() call inside `%s`, follow the stack trace as described in https://reactjs.org/link/setstate-in-render
ast.target: 在渲染另一个组件（`%s`）时，无法更新组件（`%s`）。要定位 `%s` 内部错误的 setState() 调用，请按照 https://reactjs.org/link/setstate-in-render 中描述的堆栈跟踪进行查看。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cannot update during an existing state transition (such as within `render`). Render methods should be a pure function of props and state.
ast.target: 在现有状态转换期间（例如在 `render` 中）无法更新。渲染方法应当是 props 和 state 的纯函数。

ast.name: error
error
error
ast.source: Profiler must specify an "id" of type `string` as a prop. Received the type `%s` instead.
ast.target: Profiler 必须以 prop 指定一个类型为 `string` 的 "id"。但收到的类型是 `%s`。

ast.name: error
ast.source:
Render methods should be a pure function of props and state; triggering nested component updates from render is not allowed. If necessary, trigger nested updates in componentDidUpdate.

Check the render method of %s.
ast.target:
渲染方法应当是 props 和 state 的纯函数；不允许在 render 中触发嵌套组件更新。如有必要，请在 componentDidUpdate 中触发嵌套更新。

请检查 %s 的 render 方法。

ast.name: error
ast.source: render(...): Expected the last optional `callback` argument to be a function. Instead received: %s.
ast.target: render(...): 预期最后一个可选的 `callback` 参数为函数，但收到的是：%s。

ast.name: error
ast.source: render(...): does not support the second callback argument. To execute a side effect after rendering, declare it in a component body with useEffect().
ast.target: render(...): 不支持第二个回调参数。若要在渲染后执行副作用，请在组件主体中使用 useEffect() 声明它。

ast.name: error
ast.source: You passed a container to the second argument of root.render(...). You don't need to pass it again since you already passed it to create the root.
ast.target: 你把容器作为 root.render(...) 的第二个参数传入了。你不需要再次传入，因为你已经在创建根时传过了。

ast.name: error
ast.source: You passed a second argument to root.render(...) but it only accepts one argument.
ast.target: 你向 root.render(...) 传入了第二个参数，但它只接受一个参数。

ast.name: error
ast.source: unmount(...): does not support a callback argument. To execute a side effect after rendering, declare it in a component body with useEffect().
ast.target: unmount(...): 不支持回调参数。要在渲染后执行副作用，请在组件体中用 useEffect() 声明。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Must provide initial children as second argument to hydrateRoot. Example usage: hydrateRoot(domContainer, <App />)
ast.target: 必须将初始子节点作为第二个参数传给 hydrateRoot。示例用法：hydrateRoot(domContainer, <App />)

ast.name: error
ast.source: You are calling ReactDOMClient.createRoot() on a container that was previously passed to ReactDOM.render(). This is not supported.
ast.target: 你在一个之前传给 ReactDOM.render() 的容器上调用了 ReactDOMClient.createRoot()。这不受支持。

ast.name: error
ast.source: You are calling ReactDOMClient.createRoot() on a container that has already been passed to createRoot() before. Instead, call root.render() on the existing root instead if you want to update it.
ast.target: 你在一个已经传给 createRoot() 的容器上调用了 ReactDOMClient.createRoot()。如果你想更新它，请改为在现有 root 上调用 root.render()。

ast.name: error
ast.source: render(...): Replacing React-rendered children with a new root component. If you intended to update the children of this node, you should instead have the existing children update their state and render the new components instead of calling ReactDOM.render.
ast.target: render(...): 正在用新的根组件替换由 React 渲染的子节点。如果你想更新此节点的子节点，应让现有子节点更新其状态并渲染新组件，而不是调用 ReactDOM.render。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s is accessing findDOMNode inside its render(). render() should be a pure function of props and state. It should never access something that requires stale data from the previous render, such as refs. Move this logic to componentDidMount and componentDidUpdate instead.
ast.target: %s 在其 render() 中访问了 findDOMNode。render() 应该是 props 和 state 的纯函数，不应访问需要上一轮渲染的陈旧数据的内容，例如 refs。请将此逻辑移到 componentDidMount 和 componentDidUpdate 中。

ast.name: error
ast.source: ReactDOM.hydrate is no longer supported in React 18. Use hydrateRoot instead. Until you switch to the new API, your app will behave as if it's running React 17. Learn more: https://reactjs.org/link/switch-to-createroot
ast.target: React 18 中不再支持 ReactDOM.hydrate。请改用 hydrateRoot。在切换到新 API 之前，你的应用将表现得像在运行 React 17。了解更多：https://reactjs.org/link/switch-to-createroot

ast.name: error
ast.source: ReactDOM.render is no longer supported in React 18. Use createRoot instead. Until you switch to the new API, your app will behave as if it's running React 17. Learn more: https://reactjs.org/link/switch-to-createroot
ast.target: React 18 中不再支持 ReactDOM.render。请改用 createRoot。在切换到新 API 之前，你的应用将表现得像在运行 React 17。了解更多：https://reactjs.org/link/switch-to-createroot

ast.name: error
ast.source: ReactDOM.unstable_renderSubtreeIntoContainer() is no longer supported in React 18. Consider using a portal instead. Until you switch to the createRoot API, your app will behave as if it's running React 17. Learn more: https://reactjs.org/link/switch-to-createroot
ast.target: ReactDOM.unstable_renderSubtreeIntoContainer() 在 React 18 中不再受支持。请考虑改用 portal。在切换到 createRoot API 之前，你的应用将表现得像在运行 React 17。了解更多：https://reactjs.org/link/switch-to-createroot

ast.name: error
ast.source: You are calling ReactDOM.unmountComponentAtNode() on a container that was previously passed to ReactDOMClient.createRoot(). This is not supported. Did you mean to call root.unmount()?
ast.target: 你正在对之前传给 ReactDOMClient.createRoot() 的容器调用 ReactDOM.unmountComponentAtNode()。这不受支持。你是想调用 root.unmount() 吗？

ast.name: error
ast.source: React depends on Map and Set built-in types. Make sure that you load a polyfill in older browsers. https://reactjs.org/link/react-polyfills
ast.target: React 依赖于内置类型 Map 和 Set。请确保在较旧的浏览器中加载 polyfill。https://reactjs.org/link/react-polyfills

ast.name: error
ast.source: You are importing createRoot from "react-dom" which is not supported. You should instead import it from "react-dom/client".
ast.target: 你正在从“react-dom”导入 createRoot，这是不受支持的。你应该改为从“react-dom/client”导入。

ast.name: error
ast.source: You are importing hydrateRoot from "react-dom" which is not supported. You should instead import it from "react-dom/client".
ast.target: 你正在从“react-dom”导入 hydrateRoot，这是不受支持的。你应该改为从“react-dom/client”导入。

ast.name: error
ast.source: flushSync was called from inside a lifecycle method. React cannot flush when React is already rendering. Consider moving this call to a scheduler task or micro task.
ast.target: flushSync 在生命周期方法内部被调用。React 在已经渲染时无法进行 flush。请考虑将此调用移至调度任务或微任务。

ast.name: log
ast.source: loading plugin
ast.target: 正在加载插件

ast.name: log
ast.source: unloading plugin
ast.target: 正在卸载插件

ast.name: warn
ast.source: %s(...) is deprecated in plain JavaScript React classes. %s
ast.target: %s(...) 在纯 JavaScript React 类中已弃用。%s

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Setting `displayName` on Context.Consumer has no effect. You should set it directly on the context with Context.displayName = '%s'.
ast.target: 在 Context.Consumer 上设置 `displayName` 没有效果。你应该直接在 context 上设置：Context.displayName = '%s'。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Factory.type is deprecated. Access the class directly before passing it to createFactory.
ast.target: Factory.type 已弃用。在传给 createFactory 之前请直接访问该类。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Detected a large number of updates inside startTransition. If this is due to a subscription please re-write it to use React provided hooks. Otherwise concurrent mode guarantees are off the table.
ast.target: 检测到 startTransition 内部有大量更新。如果这是由订阅导致的，请改写为使用 React 提供的 hooks。否则并发模式的保证将不再适用。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: copyWithRename() expects paths of the same length
ast.target: copyWithRename() 期望路径长度相同

ast.name: warn
ast.source: copyWithRename() expects paths to be the same except for the deepest key
ast.target: copyWithRename() 期望路径除最深层键外保持一致

ast.name: warn
ast.source: hydrate through createRoot is deprecated. Use ReactDOMClient.hydrateRoot(container, <App />) instead.
ast.target: 通过 createRoot 进行 hydrate 已弃用。请改用 ReactDOMClient.hydrateRoot(container, <App />)。
